message:
test(fwc): expand test coverage and apply rustfmt across fwc modules

Add extensive new tests to credential_store (AuthMethod detection edge
cases, field handling, timestamps), schema_nav (validate_input for
boolean/array/object/null types, min/max boundaries, enum integers,
nested required fields), and json_diff (struct equality, summary edge
cases, long string formatting).

Apply rustfmt formatting across 38 fwc modules — mainly expanding
multi-argument function calls, long assert! chains, and struct
initializers to comply with the project's line-width rules. Also
reorders some use-imports in catalog.rs tests for consistency.

No logic changes outside the new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
